Off Calendar Jun-02-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. Court orders case dismissed without prejudice. Proceedings reported by: Floyd Butler, CSR#2518 (212)

Motion Requesting Order Dismissing Action Be Set Aside
Off Calendar Sep-10-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Rudolph Vasquez, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff.

Plaintiff's motion requesting order dismissing action be set aside is heard this day. Plaintiff's motion is ordered granted. Court ordered case set to Uninsured Motorist Order to Show Cause for Feb-02-05 at 10:00 AM, Dept. 212. Order signed in open court. Proceedings reported by: Susan Lee (212)

UNINSURED MOTORIST ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Case is ordered dismissed without prejudice. Proceedings reported by: June Leathley, CSR#1629. (212)

Motion Requesting Order Dismissing Action Be Set Aside
Off Calendar Mar-22-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff's Motion to Set Aside Order Dismissing Arction is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Dismissal is ordered set aside. Order signed. Court ordered an OSC for Uninsured Motorist set on 8/4/2004 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Sara Lerschen, CSR #6213. (212)
